hero.label: Private Capital · Est. 2024
hero.headline: Where serious capital meets vetted ventures.
hero.sub: A private marketplace for founders raising capital and investors deploying it. Every listing is vetted. Every number is real. 2% fee — only after you close.
hero.subheadline: A private marketplace for founders raising capital and investors deploying it. Every listing is vetted. Every number is real. 2% fee — only after you close.
hero.trust: Join founders and investors building the next generation of companies.
hero.beFirst: Be among the first vetted listings.

listings.title: Featured listings
listings.noListings: No active listings yet. Be the first to list your startup.
listings.empty: No active listings yet. Be the first to list your startup.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.f1desc: Complete your profile, upload your pitch deck, add financials, and answer key investor questions.
howItWorks.founderStep1Desc: Complete your profile, upload your pitch deck, add financials, and answer key investor questions.
howItWorks.f2desc: Our model evaluates your deck, financials, and team — returning a 0–100 score with a full breakdown.
howItWorks.founderStep2Desc: Our model evaluates your deck, financials, and team — returning a 0–100 score with a full breakdown.
howItWorks.f3desc: Investors browse and filter by score, stage, and sector. Matched investors see your full listing.
howItWorks.founderStep3Desc: Investors browse and filter by score, stage, and sector. Matched investors see your full listing.
howItWorks.f4desc: Use our pipeline tools to track conversations, share NDAs, and close with confidence.
howItWorks.founderStep4Desc: Use our pipeline tools to track conversations, share NDAs, and close with confidence.
howItWorks.i1desc: Every startup is approved before going live. No spam, no unvetted pitches, no wasted time.
howItWorks.investorStep1Desc: Every startup is approved before going live. No spam, no unvetted pitches, no wasted time.
howItWorks.i2desc: Filter by score, stage, sector, and MRR. Let AI rank matches by your investment thesis.
howItWorks.investorStep2Desc: Filter by score, stage, sector, and MRR. Let AI rank matches by your investment thesis.
howItWorks.i3desc: Unlock financials and NDA-gated documents in one click.
howItWorks.investorStep3Desc: Unlock financials and NDA-gated documents in one click.
howItWorks.i4desc: Manage conversations, notes, and terms from a unified investment dashboard.
howItWorks.investorStep4Desc: Manage conversations, notes, and terms from a unified investment dashboard.

aiSection.t1desc: Upload your deck and financials. Our model evaluates team, traction, market size, and narrative — returning a 0–100 score with a full breakdown.
aiSection.t2desc: State your thesis, geography, and cheque size. AI surfaces listings most aligned to your strategy — ranked by fit, not recency.
aiSection.t3desc: Request an AI-generated due diligence report on any listing. Covers financials, competition, risks, and key questions — in minutes.

ai.title: AI-powered analysis
ai.tool1Desc: Upload your deck and financials. Our model evaluates team, traction, market size, and narrative — returning a 0–100 score with a full breakdown.
ai.tool2Desc: State your thesis, geography, and cheque size. AI surfaces listings most aligned to your strategy — ranked by fit, not recency.
ai.tool3Desc: Request an AI-generated due diligence report on any listing. Covers financials, competition, risks, and key questions — in minutes.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.pageSub: Free during launch. Subscriptions begin after our first 100 members.
pricing.successFee: 2% success fee on all closed rounds — charged to the founder only, after capital is received.

cta.headline: The right capital, at the right stage.
cta.label: Ready to start?
cta.sub: Join founders and investors using CapitalReach to close deals faster.

dashboard.listingPending: Your listing is under review — typically 24–48 hours
dashboard.noListing: You haven't created a listing yet
dashboard.reviewNote: Our team will approve your listing within 1–2 business days.
dashboard.noDocuments: No documents uploaded. Add your pitch deck to attract investors.
dashboard.setUpProfileSub: Create your listing to start attracting investors on CapitalReach.
dashboard.noAiReports: No AI reports yet. Request due diligence on any startup.

settings.languageSub: Choose the language for the entire CapitalReach interface. All text will switch immediately.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the CapitalReach interface.
settings.notificationsDesc: All transactional emails (messages, deal updates, NDA completions) are sent to your address. Manage marketing preferences in your inbox or contact support.
settings.billingDesc: Manage your subscription, update your payment method, or download invoices through the Stripe Customer Portal.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? All your data, listings, and subscriptions will be permanently removed.
settings.avatarHint: Paste a direct image URL, or use a service like Gravatar

footer.tagline: A private marketplace connecting founders raising capital with qualified investors deploying it.
footer.legal: Not a registered broker-dealer or investment adviser. The 2% success fee is charged only after a funding round closes.
